summary: Key findings: Rozier (not All-Star) and Billups (coach, not player) arrested for gambling Oct 2025 - neither qualifies. No All-Star player has been suspended for betting. CP at 10.00% exactly at threshold. Only ~3 weeks remain for underlying question.
content:
The underlying question asks if an All-Star from NFL/NBA/MLB/NHL will be banned/suspended for sports betting before 2026. Current CP is 10.00% as of Dec 6, 2025.

Key developments:
- Terry Rozier (NBA, Miami Heat) arrested Oct 23, 2025 for gambling-related charges. NOT an All-Star.
- Chauncey Billups arrested same day - 5x All-Star but is a COACH, explicitly excluded by fine print.
- NFL reported no players suspended for gambling violations in 2024 season.
- No All-Star player from any league has been suspended for betting as of Dec 2025.

For the meta-question: CP is exactly at 10.00%. Question asks if it will be STRICTLY higher than 10.00% on Dec 21.
- With only ~10 days remaining until the underlying question deadline (Jan 1, 2026), CP should drift DOWN
- 201 forecasters = moderate stability
- No new catalysts expected to push CP up
- The Rozier/Billups news was already absorbed by Oct/Nov
